meta.homeDescription: cryptofoundry builds and maintains self-hosted crypto automation and infrastructure for teams that want control, security, and real engineering.

contact.title: Contact cryptofoundry
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you want to build or automate.
contact.primaryCta: Tell us what you want to automate

home.heroTitle: We build crypto software and keep it running in production.
home.heroBody: Bots, payments, trading tools, and node infrastructure — built by the engineers behind a real open-source blockchain ecosystem. You keep the keys; we do the engineering.
home.whyTitle: Everything we sell, we also run ourselves
home.whyBody: Our background is not theoretical: we are the builders behind ADAMANT — a blockchain, messenger, and wallet ecosystem that has been online for a decade. That changes how we write software for you.
home.trustOperatorsBody: We run our own nodes, wallets, bots, and explorers. When we design your system, we already know how it fails at 3 a.m. — because we carry the pager for ours.
home.trustSelfHostedBody: Your keys, your servers, your data. We design systems where custody stays with you, and we can walk away without taking anything hostage.
home.trustNoHypeBody: No profit promises, no fake volume, no token launches. We build tools and infrastructure — measurable engineering with clear boundaries.
home.servicesBody: Six directions, one discipline: software your team controls, deployed on infrastructure you own, maintained for years.
home.processScopeBody: You describe the workflow, exchanges, chains, and constraints. We answer with a concrete technical proposal — components, boundaries, and what we will not build.
home.processForgeBody: We build in short iterations on a repository you can read. Working software early, no black boxes, no surprise rewrites at the end.
home.processTemperBody: Security review, key handling, monitoring, and failure drills before anything touches real funds or production traffic.
home.processRunBody: Deployment on your infrastructure, documentation, and long-term maintenance if you want it. You keep the keys and the off switch.
home.ossBody: A decade of continuous development, open since {year}. Production blockchain infrastructure you can inspect commit by commit on GitHub — no slide-deck Web3.
home.notesBody: Technical articles, release notes, and engineering updates from the systems we build and maintain.
home.ctaTitle: Tell us what you want to automate
home.ctaBody: Describe the workflow in plain words — we respond with an engineering take, not a sales script. No hype, no custody, no guaranteed-profit fairy tales.

footer.tagline: Self-hosted crypto software, built and maintained in production. cryptofoundry is independent; our engineers also contribute to the separate open-source ADAMANT ecosystem.

servicePage.startBody: Describe your workflow — we reply with an engineering take.

faq.question: What could we build together?
faq.answer: Tell us what is slowing your team down. We can turn it into a self-hosted bot, payment flow, trading tool, node setup, or private communication system — then deploy it on infrastructure you control.

faq.question: Will you ever hold our funds or private keys?
faq.answer: No. We design the system so custody stays with you. We can help configure and operate it, but your team keeps the keys, the servers, the data, and the off switch.

faq.question: What makes cryptofoundry different from a typical agency?
faq.answer: We maintain the same kind of software we build for clients. Our engineers have spent a decade building and operating the open-source ADAMANT ecosystem, so production failures, upgrades, and long-term maintenance are part of the design from day one.

faq.question: How do we get started?
faq.answer: Send a short note to business@adamant.im or use the Contact button. Plain language is enough: tell us the problem, the systems involved, and any constraints. We will reply with an honest technical take and a practical next step.
